site.name: SaaSPolarBeam
site.tagline: Real Reviews. Real Features. Smarter Automation.

tool.name: GoHighLevel
tool.description: GoHighLevel is an all-in-one marketing and sales platform designed for agencies, small businesses, and entrepreneurs. It combines CRM, email/SMS marketing, funnel building, appointment scheduling, reputation management, AI voice agents, and white-label capabilities into a single platform — replacing 10+ separate tools.

features.name: CRM & Pipeline Management
features.shortDesc: Visual pipelines, contact management, lead scoring
features.details: Manage every contact in a centralized CRM with customizable pipelines, stages, and lead scoring. Track calls, emails, SMS, and appointments all tied to each contact record. Automatically enrich contact data and segment audiences for targeted campaigns.
benefits: Centralized contact history across every channel
Visual pipeline drag-and-drop interface
Automated lead scoring based on engagement
Custom fields and tags for granular segmentation

features.name: AI Voice Agents
features.shortDesc: 24/7 AI receptionist that answers and qualifies calls
features.details: Deploy AI-powered voice agents that answer incoming calls 24/7, qualify leads, book appointments, and transfer to humans when needed. Supports natural conversation with context retention across the call history.
benefits: Never miss a call — day or night
Qualify leads automatically before human handoff
Book appointments directly into your calendar
Cut receptionist costs by up to 80%

features.name: Funnel Builder
features.shortDesc: Drag-and-drop landing pages, sales funnels, checkout
features.details: Build high-converting landing pages and sales funnels with an intuitive drag-and-drop editor. Includes pre-built templates, A/B testing, analytics, and native checkout with payment processing.
benefits: No coding or design skills required
Pre-built funnel templates for any industry
Native checkout with Stripe integration
A/B test any page element to optimize conversions

features.name: Email & SMS Marketing
features.shortDesc: Automated campaigns, bulk messaging, two-way SMS
features.details: Send unlimited emails and SMS to your contacts with powerful automation triggers. Build drip campaigns, broadcast messages, and two-way SMS conversations — all from one platform with detailed delivery analytics.
benefits: Unlimited email sends on all plans
Two-way SMS with full conversation history
Visual automation builder for drip campaigns
Personalized merge tags for higher engagement

features.name: Appointment Scheduling
features.details: Let clients book appointments directly through your website, social media, or booking link. Automated email/SMS reminders cut no-shows dramatically. Supports one-on-one, group events, and round-robin scheduling.
benefits: Self-service booking 24/7
Automated reminders cut no-shows by 80%
Sync with Google Calendar, Outlook, iCal
Group workshops and webinar scheduling

features.name: Reputation Management
features.shortDesc: Review requests, monitoring, AI reply generation
features.details: Automate review requests via SMS and email after service completion. Monitor reviews across Google, Facebook, and Yelp. AI-powered reply generation helps you respond professionally to every review instantly.
benefits: Automated review request campaigns
Smart routing — happy customers to Google, complaints to private form
AI-generated review replies in your brand voice
Centralized review monitoring dashboard

features.name: Memberships & Courses
features.shortDesc: Paid content access, course hosting, communities
features.details: Create and sell membership sites and online courses directly within GHL. Host video lessons, PDFs, and quizzes. Control access by tier, one-time payment, or recurring subscription — no third-party platform needed.
benefits: Replace Kajabi/Teachable — save $149+/month
Drip content on a schedule or by completion
Native payment collection for memberships
Community features for student engagement

features.name: Workflow Automations
features.details: Build powerful multi-step automation workflows with triggers, conditions, and actions. Connect CRM events, form submissions, payments, and more into automated sequences that run your business on autopilot.
benefits: Visual workflow builder — no coding needed
Conditional logic for complex business rules
Native integrations across all GHL features
Time-based and event-based triggers

features.name: Reporting & Analytics
features.shortDesc: Client dashboards, campaign tracking, ROI reports
features.details: Comprehensive reporting dashboards for every aspect of your business. Track campaign performance, sales pipeline velocity, team activity, and ROI. Generate white-label reports for agency clients.
benefits: Pre-built dashboards for every feature
Custom reporting date ranges and filters
White-label reports for client delivery
Real-time data with automated email reports

features.name: White-Label / SaaS Mode
features.shortDesc: Rebrand as your own platform, sell to clients
features.details: Completely rebrand GoHighLevel as your own software. Custom domain, logo, colors, and even custom sub-accounts for your clients. Charge whatever you want — GHL becomes your SaaS platform without the development cost.
benefits: Full white-label with custom domain
Sell GHL to clients at your own price
Create sub-accounts for each client
Built-in billing and client management

competitors.name: HubSpot
competitors.description: HubSpot is a leading CRM platform with powerful marketing, sales, and service hubs. Best for mid-market to enterprise businesses but significantly more expensive than GHL.

competitors.name: Kajabi
competitors.description: Kajabi is the leading platform for course creators and coaches. Excellent for digital products but lacks CRM depth, SMS marketing, and agency features that GHL offers.

competitors.name: ClickFunnels
competitors.description: ClickFunnels pioneered the sales funnel industry. Excellent funnel builder but limited to funnels — lacks CRM depth, SMS, reputation management, and white-label SaaS features.

competitors.name: Mailchimp
competitors.description: Mailchimp is the most popular email marketing platform. Great for email but doesn't offer CRM pipelines, funnel building, booking, or the all-in-one agency features GHL provides.

pricing.note: Contact-based pricing scales with list size

competitors.name: Salesforce
competitors.description: Salesforce is the world's #1 CRM platform. Unmatched for large enterprises but overkill and overpriced for SMBs and agencies. Complex setup, high cost, and limited marketing features out of the box.
pros: Most powerful CRM on the market

audiences.name: Marketing Agencies
audiences.title: GoHighLevel for Marketing Agencies
audiences.metaDesc: How marketing agencies use GoHighLevel to manage 50+ clients from one dashboard, automate reporting, and white-label the platform as their own.
audiences.problem: Juggling 5-10 separate tools (CRM, email, funnels, scheduling) across multiple clients. Manual reporting eats hours. Can't scale without hiring.
audiences.realReview: "We managed 12 clients with HubSpot, Mailchimp, Calendly, and ClickFunnels — $1,500/month in tools alone. GHL replaced all of them. Now we pay $297 and our client work is 3x faster." — Reddit, r/agency
audiences.solution: GHL replaces 10 tools with one platform. Snapshots let you clone winning setups across clients instantly. White-label mode turns GHL into your own software.

audiences.name: Real Estate Agents
audiences.title: GoHighLevel for Real Estate Agents
audiences.metaDesc: Real estate professionals use GoHighLevel to automate lead follow-ups, nurture buyers with drip campaigns, and never miss a deal.
audiences.problem: Leads come in from Zillow, Facebook, and open houses but follow-ups are manual and slow. 80% of leads never get contacted after the first 24 hours.
audiences.realReview: "I was losing leads because I couldn't respond fast enough. GHL's AI voice agent answers calls instantly, qualifies buyers, and books showings. I closed 3 deals from AI-qualified leads in my first month." — r/RealEstate
audiences.solution: Automated lead capture from all sources. AI voice agents answer instantly. Drip sequences nurture buyers for months until they're ready.

audiences.name: Small Business Owners
audiences.title: GoHighLevel for Small Business Owners
audiences.metaDesc: Stop juggling scattered tools. GoHighLevel gives small businesses CRM, email, booking, and payments in one affordable platform.
audiences.problem: Small business owners wear every hat. Leads fall through cracks, follow-ups don't happen, and there's no system — just sticky notes and spreadsheets.
audiences.realReview: "I run a cleaning business with 4 employees. Before GHL, I was using a notebook for leads. Now I have automated reminders, text booking, and review requests. Revenue up 40% in 3 months." — GHL User Forum
audiences.solution: One dashboard for leads, bookings, payments, and follow-ups. Automated reminders cut no-shows. Review requests build your reputation automatically.

audiences.name: Coaches & Consultants
audiences.title: GoHighLevel for Coaches & Consultants
audiences.metaDesc: Coaches and consultants use GoHighLevel to host courses, book sessions, send email sequences, and manage clients — all without Kajabi or Teachable.
audiences.problem: Paying for Kajabi ($149) + Calendly ($96) + Mailchimp ($79) + Zoom ($149) = $473/month. Too many tools, too much complexity.
audiences.realReview: "I was on Kajabi, Calendly, and Mailchimp separately. GHL replaced all three for $97/month. My course is hosted natively, bookings auto-sync, and my email sequences run on autopilot." — Medium review
audiences.solution: Native course hosting replaces Kajabi. Built-in booking replaces Calendly. Email automation replaces Mailchimp. All for $97/month.

audiences.name: Local Service Businesses
audiences.title: GoHighLevel for Local Service Businesses
audiences.metaDesc: Dentists, gyms, salons, and spas use GoHighLevel to auto-remind appointments, request reviews, and fill their schedule on autopilot.
audiences.problem: High no-show rates, low review count, no automated follow-up. Staff spends hours on the phone reminding clients when they could be serving them.
audiences.realReview: "Our dental practice had 20% no-show rate. GHL automated reminders cut it to 3%. We also went from 12 Google reviews to 87 in 4 months. The system runs itself." — GHL Case Study
audiences.solution: Automated appointment reminders via SMS/email. Review request campaigns. Online booking that fills your calendar 24/7.

audiences.name: Home Service Pros
audiences.title: GoHighLevel for Home Service Professionals
audiences.metaDesc: Plumbers, electricians, HVAC, and contractors use GoHighLevel to automate estimates, follow-ups, and booking.
audiences.problem: Missed calls mean lost jobs. Paper estimates get lost. No automated system for follow-ups or review requests after a job is done.
audiences.realReview: "As an HVAC contractor, I was losing 30% of calls. GHL's AI voice agent books estimates for me while I'm on a job. I close 40% more work now." — HVAC Business Owner
audiences.solution: AI voice agents answer calls 24/7. Automated estimate follow-ups. Review requests after every job.

audiences.name: Real Estate Investors
audiences.title: GoHighLevel for Real Estate Investors
audiences.metaDesc: Wholesalers, flippers, and buy-and-hold investors use GoHighLevel to automate deal sourcing, follow-ups, and investor relations.
audiences.problem: Deal sourcing generates hundreds of leads but most go cold. Follow-ups are inconsistent. Investor communication is manual and time-consuming.
audiences.realReview: "I wholesale 20+ properties a year. GHL automates my cold SMS campaigns and drip nurtures. I track every lead from 'motivated seller' to close. Best $297 I spend." — Wholesaler, REI Facebook Group
audiences.solution: Automated SMS campaigns for deal sourcing. Pipeline tracking from lead to close. Investor relationship workflows.

audiences.name: Dental Practices
audiences.title: GoHighLevel for Dental Practices
audiences.metaDesc: Dentists use GoHighLevel to reduce no-shows, automate recall campaigns, and grow their online reputation.
audiences.problem: High no-show rates waste chair time. Manual recall campaigns are inconsistent. Low review counts hurt local search rankings.
audiences.realReview: "Our practice went from 20% no-shows to 3% with GHL reminders. Automated recall campaigns brought back 40+ patients in the first month." — Dental Practice Manager
audiences.solution: Automated appointment reminders. Recall campaign automation. Review request workflows post-appointment.

audiences.name: Medical & Health Practices
audiences.title: GoHighLevel for Medical Practices
audiences.metaDesc: Chiropractors, therapists, and clinics use GoHighLevel to automate intake, reminders, and patient communication.
audiences.problem: Manual intake forms and phone-based scheduling eat staff time. No-shows disrupt schedules. Patient follow-up is sporadic.
audiences.realReview: "We reduced admin work by 15 hours/week with GHL's automated intake and booking. Patients love the text reminders." — Chiropractic Clinic Owner
audiences.solution: Digital intake forms. Automated booking and reminders. HIPAA-compliant patient communication workflows.

audiences.name: Salons & Spas
audiences.title: GoHighLevel for Salons & Spas
audiences.metaDesc: Beauty professionals use GoHighLevel to automate booking, reminders, and rebooking campaigns.
audiences.problem: No-shows cost thousands monthly. Manual rebooking follow-ups don't happen. Appointment book fills up slowly.
audiences.realReview: "GHL automated reminders cut our no-shows from 15% to 2%. Our rebooking campaign brings back 30% of clients within 60 days." — Salon Owner
audiences.solution: Automated booking and reminders. Post-appointment rebooking campaigns. Review request automation.

problems.name: Missed Leads
problems.title: How GoHighLevel Solves Missed Leads
problems.metaDesc: Never miss a lead again. GoHighLevel's instant response + AI voice agents capture every lead within seconds — day or night.
problems.explanation: 78% of leads convert when contacted within 5 minutes. Without automation, most businesses respond in hours or days. GHL fixes this with instant SMS/email response, AI voice agents that answer calls 24/7, and smart lead routing.

problems.name: Too Many Tools
problems.title: How GoHighLevel Replaces 10 Tools
problems.metaDesc: Stop paying for 10 separate subscriptions. GoHighLevel replaces CRM, email, SMS, funnels, booking, and more in one platform.
problems.explanation: Average business uses 6-10 marketing tools costing $500-$1,500/month. GHL replaces most of them with one $97-$297 subscription. Users report cutting their tech stack by 70% and saving hours weekly.

problems.name: Slow Follow-Up
problems.title: How GoHighLevel Speeds Up Follow-Up
problems.metaDesc: Automated follow-up sequences ensure no lead is forgotten. Multi-channel drips via email, SMS, and voice keep you top-of-mind.
problems.explanation: Speed-to-lead is everything. GHL triggers instant multi-channel responses the moment a lead enters your system. 5-step nurture sequences run automatically. Users report 2-3x conversion improvements.

problems.name: Appointment No-Shows
problems.title: How GoHighLevel Eliminates Appointment No-Shows
problems.metaDesc: Automated reminders via SMS and email cut no-show rates from 20% to under 3%. Built-in booking system with confirmation flows.
problems.explanation: No-shows cost service businesses thousands monthly. GHL sends 24-hour and 1-hour automated reminders, collects confirmations, and allows easy rescheduling. Businesses report dropping from 20% to 3% no-show rate.

problems.name: Low Online Reviews
problems.title: How GoHighLevel Boosts Your Online Reviews
problems.metaDesc: Automated review request campaigns help businesses grow from 10 to 100+ Google reviews in months.
problems.explanation: Customers rarely leave reviews unless asked. GHL automates review requests via SMS and email after service completion. Smart routing sends happy customers to Google and filters unhappy ones to a private feedback form.

problems.name: Manual Processes Wasting Time
problems.title: How GoHighLevel Automates Manual Processes
problems.metaDesc: Stop doing repetitive tasks by hand. GHL automates follow-ups, invoicing, scheduling, and reporting so you focus on what matters.
problems.explanation: Business owners spend 20+ hours/week on repetitive tasks. GHL workflows automate lead nurturing, payment collection, appointment reminders, review requests, and client reporting. Users report saving 15+ hours weekly.

guides.name: Setting Up Your First Funnel
guides.title: How to Set Up Your First Sales Funnel in GoHighLevel
guides.metaDesc: Step-by-step guide to building your first sales funnel in GoHighLevel — from template selection to payment collection.
guides.intro: Sales funnels are the backbone of online lead generation. GoHighLevel's funnel builder makes it easy to create professional landing pages, capture leads, and collect payments — all without writing a line of code.
steps: Choose a funnel template from the library that matches your goal (lead gen, sales, webinar registration)
Customize the page with your branding — upload logo, set colors, write your copy
Add form fields to capture lead information (name, email, phone)
Set up email/SMS notification for new leads
Integrate payment processing with Stripe if selling a product
Connect the funnel to your CRM pipeline for automatic lead routing

guides.name: Automating Follow-Ups
guides.title: How to Automate Follow-Ups in GoHighLevel
guides.metaDesc: Never lose a deal again. Learn how to set up automated multi-channel follow-up sequences in GoHighLevel.
guides.intro: Speed-to-lead is the #1 factor in conversion rates. With GoHighLevel's workflow automation, you can trigger instant multi-channel follow-ups the moment a lead enters your system.
steps: Create a new workflow triggered by 'New Lead' or 'Form Submission'
Add an immediate SMS action with a personalized greeting
Schedule an email follow-up 1 hour later with value-add content
Add a phone call task for your team 24 hours later if no response
Set up lead score adjustments based on email opens and link clicks
Create an 'abandoned' path with a final re-engagement email after 7 days

guides.name: Review Generation Campaign
guides.title: How to Build a Review Generation Campaign in GoHighLevel
guides.metaDesc: Step-by-step guide to automating review requests with GoHighLevel's reputation management tools.
guides.intro: Online reviews are the #1 trust signal for local businesses. GoHighLevel automates the entire review request process so you build social proof on autopilot.
steps: Navigate to the Reputation Management section in your GHL dashboard
Create a new review request campaign triggered by 'Appointment Completed'
Customize the SMS message — keep it personal and short
Set up smart routing: happy customers → Google review link, unhappy → private feedback form
Schedule a follow-up reminder 3 days later if no review was left
Enable AI-generated reply suggestions for responding to all reviews

guides.name: Setting Up AI Voice Agents
guides.title: How to Set Up AI Voice Agents in GoHighLevel
guides.metaDesc: Deploy your first AI voice agent in GoHighLevel to answer calls, qualify leads, and book appointments 24/7.
guides.intro: AI voice agents are GoHighLevel's most advanced feature. Set one up to handle incoming calls, qualify leads naturally, and book appointments — even while you sleep.
steps: Go to the AI Voice section and create a new voice agent
Choose a voice personality (tone, accent, speaking speed)
Define the agent's script — greeting, qualification questions, booking flow
Set business hours and conditions for human handoff
Connect your phone number and set up call forwarding rules
Test the agent thoroughly before going live

guides.name: Creating a Membership Site
guides.title: How to Create a Membership Site in GoHighLevel
guides.metaDesc: Build and sell a membership site in GoHighLevel — no Kajabi or Teachable needed.
guides.intro: GoHighLevel's membership and course features let you create, host, and sell digital products without paying for a separate platform like Kajabi or Teachable.
steps: Create a new product under the Memberships section
Set pricing — one-time, recurring, or payment plan
Upload your content (videos, PDFs, quizzes, text lessons)
Organize content into modules and drip-feed on a schedule
Create a sales page funnel to promote your membership
Set up automation triggers for new member onboarding

guides.name: Using Snapshots for Clients
guides.title: How to Use Snapshots to Deploy Client Accounts Fast in GoHighLevel
guides.metaDesc: Learn how GoHighLevel snapshots let agencies clone winning setups across clients in one click.
guides.intro: Snapshots are GoHighLevel's superpower for agencies. Save an entire setup — funnels, workflows, templates — and deploy it to a new client sub-account in one click.
steps: Build your 'perfect agency setup' in a template sub-account
Go to Snapshots and create a new snapshot of your entire setup
Name it clearly (e.g., 'Real Estate Agent Starter Pack')
Share the snapshot with client sub-accounts
Client imports the snapshot — all funnels, workflows, and templates appear instantly
Customize branding per client after deployment

glossary.definition: Customer Relationship Management — a system that manages all interactions with current and potential customers. GoHighLevel's CRM tracks contacts, deals, calls, emails, and appointments in one place.
A visual representation of your sales process with stages (e.g., New Lead → Contacted → Qualified → Closed). GoHighLevel lets you create custom pipelines for different business processes.

A system that assigns points to leads based on their engagement and behavior. Higher scores mean warmer leads. GoHighLevel automatically adjusts scores based on email opens, link clicks, and form submissions.
An automated sequence of emails or SMS messages sent on a schedule or triggered by specific actions. GoHighLevel's visual workflow builder makes drip campaigns easy to create and manage.
A set of automated actions triggered by specific events. GoHighLevel's workflow builder uses triggers, conditions, and actions to automate repetitive business tasks.
Rebranding a product or service as your own. GoHighLevel's SaaS mode lets agencies put their own branding, domain, and pricing on the platform and sell it to clients.
A complete backup of your GoHighLevel setup including funnels, workflows, templates, and automations. Snapshots can be deployed to new accounts instantly.
An AI-powered virtual receptionist that answers calls, qualifies leads, and books appointments. GoHighLevel's AI voice agents use natural language processing for human-like conversations.
A step-by-step marketing process designed to convert visitors into customers. GoHighLevel's funnel builder creates landing pages with forms, payments, and automation triggers.
Using text messages for marketing communications. GoHighLevel supports bulk SMS, two-way conversations, and automated SMS campaigns with full compliance tools.
The process of collecting information from potential customers. GoHighLevel captures leads through forms, chatbots, phone calls, AI voice agents, and API integrations.
A separate GoHighLevel account created under a parent agency account. Each sub-account has its own CRM, funnels, and automations while the agency maintains control.
